mapper.select: select * from aiw_user_profile where user_biz_id = #{userBizId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into aiw_user_profile (biz_id, user_biz_id, nickname, avatar_url, locale, timezone, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) values (#{bizId}, #{userBizId}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{locale}, #{timezone}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted}) on duplicate key update nickname = values(nickname), avatar_url = values(avatar_url), locale = values(locale), timezone = values(timezone), updated_at = values(updated_at), is_deleted = values(is_deleted)
mapper.update: update aiw_user_profile set is_deleted = 1 where user_biz_id = #{userBizId}
